article_meta.title: Family Welcome To The Future, Where AI Grandma Raises The Kid You Bought From The Baby Bank By: Elle Purnell November 19

reasoning: The summary consistently attributes evaluative claims to the article/author and replaces the source’s loaded language with neutral phrasing. No unqualified adoption of the article’s moral or emotional framing appears.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (critiques, argues) and avoids the article’s loaded terms like ‘necromancy’ or ‘repulsive.’
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are framed as the author’s arguments or positions; no contested assertions are stated as fact.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Subjective judgments are consistently attributed to the author, not presented as the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Tone is measured; no amplification of the source’s alarmist rhetoric.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No speculation about intentions beyond attributing the author’s stated views.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects the op-ed’s critical stance while noting the ad/app; no extra bias added.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Major perspectives present (author’s critique and the app/ad’s existence) are included; minor illustrative anecdotes omitted without skewing perspective.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids subjective adjectives except within attributed claims (e.g., ‘disrespectful’ as the article’s label).
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Negative framing is attributed and not exaggerated beyond the article.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential deference to any institutional/grassroots source.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: Noticeably more neutral than the source, with explicit attribution of value-laden claims.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures the author’s viewpoint and the ad’s premise; however, the sources_represented list mixes outlets with perspectives and could more clearly separate viewpoints.
